hero.title: Aurion Mental Health Clinic
hero.subtitle1: Aho wizera kubona ubufasha mu mitekerereze
hero.subtitle2: mu ibanga, ubunyamwuga no ku giti cyawe
hero.description: Habona ubufasha bujyanye n'ibyo ukeneye, mu buryo bwizewe, bw’ibanga kandi bwubaha umuntu.

services.title: Ubuvuzi bukwiranye n'ibyo ukeneye byose
services.subtitle: Ubufasha bwo mu mutwe bugamije kugufasha mu buryo bw’ineza, ubuhanga n’ibanga rikomeye.

items.title: Inama ku muntu ku giti cye
items.description: Ubufasha bwihariye bugufasha gusobanukirwa amarangamutima yawe no kugera ku buzima buzira umuze.

items.title: Ubuvuzi bw’abashakanye
items.description: Gushimangira umubano wanyu binyuze mu biganiro byubaka biyobowe n’inzobere.

items.title: Gucunga stress
items.description: Wiga uburyo bufatika bwo kugabanya ihangayikishijwe no kugarura ituze buri munsi.

about.title: Umuhanga mu buvuzi bwo mu mutwe wizewe
about.paragraph1: Aurion Mental Health Clinic yizera ko buri muntu akwiye ubufasha bwihariye, bwubaha kandi bubikwa ibanga. Dukoresha ubuhanga, kumva neza no uburyo bugezweho kugira ngo tugufashe kugarura ituze n’ubuzima bwiza.
about.paragraph2: Uburyo bwacu bushyira umuntu imbere, bushimangira icyizere, ubumuntu no kubaha urugendo rwawe kugira ngo ugere ku bisubizo birambye.

process.title: Urugendo rwawe intambwe ku yindi
process.subtitle: Buri ntambwe yateguwe kugirango iguhe ituze kandi ikuyobore kugera ku buzima buzira umuze.

steps.title: Guhamagara
steps.description: Utugeraho byoroshye kugira ngo ubaze ibibazo cyangwa usabe gahunda mu ibanga rikomeye kandi ryizewe.

steps.title: Inama
steps.description: Ihuriro ryihariye, ku giti cyawe cyangwa kuri internet, ryo gusuzuma ibyo ukeneye no gutegura ubufasha bukubereye.

steps.title: Gukurikirana
steps.description: Gukurikirana kenshi kandi byihariye kugira ngo ushimangire iterambere ryawe n’ituze ryawe ry’igihe kirekire.

testimonials.title: Ibitekerezo by’abakiliya
testimonials.subtitle: Reba ubunararibonye bw’abakiliya bacu n’ingaruka nziza z’inkunga tubaha.

items.text: Kumva neza no gufasha ku rwego rwo hejuru.
items.author: Umukiliya

items.text: Numvaga nsobanukiwe kandi mfashijwe mu rugendo rwose.
items.author: Umukiliya

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.subtitle: Ku bibazo byose cyangwa gusaba gahunda, twandikire ukoresheje iyi fomu yizewe.

footer.description: Ikigo mpuzamahanga gitanga ubuvuzi bwo mu mutwe bufite ireme ryo hejuru, gihuza ubuhanga n’ikoranabuhanga.

bottom.rights: © 2026 Aurion Mental Health Clinic — Uburenganzira bwose burabitswe
